children.name: [WEB] Registration tests
Should not register if password and confirmation password not equals
Check errors displayed if password has invalid pattern Case: [password not contains uppercase symbols]
parameters: password not contains uppercase symbols
$bgb^b%bz#*lj@ix
Password: 5-20 chars, at least one uppercase, one lowercase, and one special char required.
